title: Albert Lionelle Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Albert Lionelle Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Albert Lionelle
Khoury Faculty
Career Changer
When Albert Lionelle was an undergrad, he pursued computer science to maximize his potential for career flexibility. This would prove beneficial, as he went on to work in computer vision, defense, and even ran a fertilizer company using modern software tools. Now as the Director of Align Online, he is passionate about helping students achieve the same flexibility within their own careers.
The most important thing, and the thing that brings a smile to my face, is when [students are] happy with how they’re progressing, and when they are content in knowing they have a future that they didn’t have before
Albert Lionelle, Director of Align Online
Explore all Khoury stories
